# Haul Command — llms.txt
# https://haulcommand.com

> Haul Command is the world's largest heavy haul logistics intelligence platform, covering pilot car operators, escort vehicles, superload corridors, and oversize load regulations across 120 countries.

## Core Resources

- [Glossary](https://haulcommand.com/glossary/): 500+ heavy haul industry terms and definitions
- [Directory](https://haulcommand.com/directory/): Global operator directory with 7,500+ verified listings
- [Blog / Intelligence](https://haulcommand.com/blog): Data-driven analysis on corridors, regulations, and market trends
- [Resource Guides](https://haulcommand.com/resources): Comprehensive guides on certifications, regulations, and operations
- [Tools](https://haulcommand.com/tools): Rate estimator, permit checker, route planner, and compliance tools

## Tools

- [Rate Estimator](https://haulcommand.com/tools/rate-estimator): Calculate pilot car and escort vehicle rates by country
- [Permit Checker](https://haulcommand.com/tools/permit-checker): Check oversize/overweight permit requirements by jurisdiction
- [Route Planner](https://haulcommand.com/tools/route-planner): Plan heavy haul routes with corridor intelligence
- [Escort Rules](https://haulcommand.com/tools/escort-rules): State-by-state escort vehicle requirements
- [Superload Meter](https://haulcommand.com/tools/superload-meter): Determine if your load qualifies as a superload

## Topics Covered

- Pilot car operations and certification
- Escort vehicle equipment requirements
- Oversize and overweight load regulations
- Superload permitting and police escort scheduling
- Height pole operations and utility coordination
- Cross-border heavy haul (US-Canada, US-Mexico)
- Wind turbine and renewable energy transport
- Bridge formula and axle weight calculations
- State-by-state reciprocity for P/EVO certifications
- International escort standards (120 countries)

## Data

- 7,500+ verified operator listings across 120 countries
- 500+ glossary terms with country-specific definitions
- 10 states with active operator directories
- Real-time dispatch intelligence and corridor data

## Contact

- Website: https://haulcommand.com
- Platform: https://haulcommand.com/claim (Operator claim/onboarding)
